Andrew’s lack of self-loathing spiked Clav’s cortisol


FearBuck (@FearedBuck)

Clavicular ends and walks out of his Channel 5 interview with Andrew Callaghan after Andrew reveals he’s satisfied with how he looks and doesn’t need looksmaxxing

Video

You’ve got to be fucking kidding me. We could use this money for so much good but instead we are using it to murder schoolgirls and start WW3


Jeff Stein (@JStein_WaPo)

SCOOP: The Pentagon asked the White House today for more than *$200 billion* for the Iran war supplemental, sources say 

Some White House aides think Congress won't support b/c it's so big

Will tee up giant battle in Congress



— https://nitter.net/JStein_WaPo/status/2034406340198551823#m
Iran still doing a lot for a military I was assured was already decimated!

“Gas prices are high because of what’s happening in the Middle East” as if it’s an act of God and not an illegal offensive war that your regime chose to start with no end in sight.


The American Conservative (@amconmag)

JD Vance on surging gas prices:

"This is a temporary blip. Under the Biden administration, gas prices were high for four years... It's not going to last forever, we're going to take care of business, come back home, and you're going to see gas prices come back down to reality.
